title: Peltier TEC Module with H-Bridge Driver
selected_approach: 40 W Peltier TEC1-12706 module driven by L298N dual H-bridge. Direction pin sets heating/cooling mode; PWM enable pin controls power level 0–255. Heatsink + fan on hot side. Arduino can cool to ambient −15 °C or heat to ambient +30 °C. Enables precise bidirectional thermal control.
